The PR moves model catalog ref helpers into `@openclaw/model-catalog-core/model-catalog-refs`, rewires internal imports/build/test/package-boundary aliases, and narrows the future timestamp predicate type.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +22, Config +11, Other +6. Total +49 across 25 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is an import-boundary refactor rather than a reported runtime bug. The relevant proof is source inspection plus the listed type, build, and package-boundary verification.

target.title: refactor: move model catalog refs into core package
target.body:
## Summary

- Move model catalog ref helpers into `@openclaw/model-catalog-core/model-catalog-refs` and delete the old `src/model-catalog/refs.ts` source helper.
- Route internal callers to the core package subpath while keeping `src/model-catalog/index.ts` from re-exporting the private package helper into public declaration output.
- Wire the new subpath through package exports, build entries, TS/Vitest/plugin-loader aliases, extension package-boundary maps, and the model-catalog-core import contract test.

## Verification

- `pnpm test packages/model-catalog-core/src/model-catalog-refs.test.ts src/model-catalog/normalize.test.ts src/model-catalog/manifest-planner.test.ts src/model-catalog/provider-index-planner.test.ts src/model-catalog/provider-index/normalize.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/model-catalog-core-imports.test.ts src/plugins/sdk-alias.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `pnpm test:extensions:package-boundary:compile`
- `pnpm build`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.plugin-sdk.dts.json --declaration true --incremental false`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p packages/plugin-sdk/tsconfig.json --declaration true`
- `rg "@openclaw/model-catalog-core/model-catalog-refs" dist/plugin-sdk packages/plugin-sdk/dist -n --glob '*.d.ts' || true`
- `git diff --check`
- autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings

Behavior addressed: model catalog ref construction now has one canonical package-owned implementation under `@openclaw/model-catalog-core/model-catalog-refs`.

Real environment tested: local macOS checkout with repo test/build wrappers.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: see Verification.

Evidence after fix: focused Vitest passed 4 shards; `check:test-types` passed; extension package-boundary compile passed for 112 plugins; `pnpm build` passed with the existing `packages/agent-core/src/harness/messages.d.ts` DTS warning; public plugin-sdk declaration grep returned no `model-catalog-refs` private subpath leaks; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

Observed result after fix: internal model-catalog callers resolve the core subpath directly, the old `src/model-catalog/refs.ts` path is gone, and the boundary test prevents that source helper from returning.

What was not tested: live provider/model catalog runtime calls; this is an internal import-boundary refactor covered by unit, contract, type, package-boundary, and build proof.
target.author: steipete
